*You'd be better off alone, Umbra.* Maybe the chaos god was right about her. Sugawara killed the man she loved. That was over seven hundred years ago. She's been alone ever since. She didn't think she wanted to find love again. Why would she? 

*So why does she care about you so fucking much?*
